name: PullRequest
description: JSON Structure description of the Gitea PullRequest entity.

additions.description: The number of lines added in the pull request

allow_maintainer_edit.description: Whether maintainers can edit the pull request

assignees.description: The list of users assigned to the pull request

body.description: The description body of the pull request

changed_files.description: The number of files changed in the pull request

comments.description: The number of comments on the pull request

content_version.description: The version of the pull request content for optimistic locking

deletions.description: The number of lines deleted in the pull request

diff_url.description: The URL to download the diff patch

draft.description: Whether the pull request is a draft

html_url.description: The HTML URL to view the pull request

id.description: The unique identifier of the pull request

is_locked.description: Whether the pull request conversation is locked

labels.description: The labels attached to the pull request

merge_commit_sha.description: The SHA of the merge commit

mergeable.description: Whether the pull request can be merged

merged.description: Whether the pull request has been merged

patch_url.description: The URL to download the patch file

pin_order.description: The pin order for the pull request

requested_reviewers.description: The users requested to review the pull request

requested_reviewers_teams.description: The teams requested to review the pull request

review_comments.description: number of review comments made on the diff of a PR review (not including comments on commits or issues in a PR)

state.description:
The current state of the pull request
open StateOpen  StateOpen pr is opened
closed StateClosed  StateClosed pr is closed

title.description: The title of the pull request

url.description: The API URL of the pull request
